series_metadata.series_title: Periodic reports for workforce development revolving loan fund
series_metadata.series_description: Monthly, quarterly, and annual reports prepared and provided by loan administrators that include, but are not limited to: the number of loan accounts pending ; the number of open and active loan accounts; the number of loan accounts in a grace period; the number of loan accounts in a deferment period (if applicable); the number of delinquent loan accounts; the number of loan accounts in default; and the number of closed loan accounts.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: conclusion of current fiscal year, and an additional 4 fiscal years
